challenge.title: Vežba 28
challenge.description: Ovo je sažetak svih razgovora koje ste upravo pročitali.
challenge.instructions:
Napišite sledeće reči ili rečenice na pravo mesto:

repository, an issue, error messages, new feature, compile, pushed, na were failing.

fillInTheBlank.sentence:
Bob: Hey, Sarah. I was checking the branch we worked on yesterday when I saw a problem. I think we should open BLANK on GitHub.

Sarah: Sure, Bob. What's the problem?

Bob: I pushed some changes to the BLANK earlier, but now the code won't BLANK. It's showing some strange errors.

Sarah: I see. Let's open an issue then. What happened when you BLANK the changes?

Bob: Well, I was adding a BLANK. While I was pushing it, I noticed that some of the tests BLANK.

Sarah: Got it. I'll create the issue on GitHub and write out the details. We can attach the BLANK, too.

Bob: Thanks, Sarah. I appreciate your help.

blanks.feedback: Problem ili zadatak koji zahteva rešavanje ili obradu u okviru projekta.
Mesto gde se sav kod i fajlovi projekta skladište, često onlajn.
Konvertovanje koda u sistem koji ga računar može da razume i izvrši.
Pošalj kod promene sa vašeg računara na cloud skladište kao GitHub.
Novi deo ili funkcionalnost dodata u aplikaciju/program.
To znači da nešto nije radilo kako treba ranije.
Upozorenja koja vas obaveštavaju da postoji nešto pogrešno u vašem kodu.
